checks.name: AP-E7 source, imported AP-E6 action, TeX, and bibliography are present and hashed
the AP-E6 canonical continuum profile checksum is reproduced
the independent chart gradient agrees with a centred directional derivative
a regular tetrahedron whose equal-weight convex combination is zero is rejected as non-admissible

checks.detail: C_N=(S^3)^(N_int) x R^(N_int); finite products of path-connected spaces are path-connected
checks.name: the fixed-boundary finite-site configuration space is path-connected
unconstrained same-action minimization converges but unwinds every tested B=1 sample to B=0
pinning only the centre to n=-1 does not define a B=1 lattice sector
three regular targets give B=1 at every accepted endpoint-guard iterate
each guarded descent reaches its admissibility floor before an interior stationary point
each fixed-3x3x3-core control converges in its explicitly restricted sector
the artificial controls retain the three-target B=1 preimage count
each artificial-sector exact tangent n+s Hessian is symmetric and positive
a core-compatible geodesic second difference reproduces every analytic n+s Hessian
diquark, gauge, ghost, and declared Wilson/Yukawa normal operators are positive on every identical grid

checks.detail: multiplicities=(Delta 2M, abelian spatial gauge 3M, abelian ghost M, fermion 8M)
checks.name: every declared proxy has the advertised same-grid multiplicity
an independent repeat of the artificial N=7,L=6 control is byte-stable after canonical JSON serialization

operator_classification.aggregate: declared direct sum only; not a BRST super-Hessian and not a physical QC2D Hessian
operator_classification.diquark: exact Hessian of the separately declared charge-two quadratic Delta sector on the fixed background
operator_classification.fermion: positive normal proxy K_F=D_W^dagger D_W; not the bosonic second variation of -log det D_W
operator_classification.gauge: free abelian xi=1 spatial-triplet proxy with 3M real dofs; not the 9M spatial-adjoint SU(2) block and no interacting cross blocks
operator_classification.ghost: free abelian Faddeev-Popov Grassmann proxy with M complex dofs; not the 3M-complex SU(2)-adjoint ghost
operator_classification.n_plus_s: exact constrained Hessian of the declared lattice energy, only after deleting fixed-core tangent rows and columns
